name: Zucchini Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Small zucchini; cleaned & sliced thinly
recipeInstructions:
1. Set aside a few slices of zucchini for garnish.
2. Heat margarine in a heavy, deep skillet.
3. Add onion, garlic, remaining zucchini, and water.
4. Cover and simmer gently for 10 minutes; stir with a wooden spoon while cooking.
5. Remove from heat; add all remaining ingredients and mix well.
6. Transfer to blender or food processor fitted with steel blades and blend for 30 seconds.
7. Serve hot or well chilled. Garnish each bowl with thin slices of zucchini.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE plus 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CHO: 6g; PRO: 3g; FAT: 4g; CAL: 64
Low-sodium diets: Omit salt. Substitute unsalted chicken broth.
